{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Naraka creatures
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Naraka creatures]] guard the door.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
